constraints: abstract illustrated weather cover, not a photograph
simplified symbolic forms, deliberate negative space, and visible hand-made or graphic texture
no photorealism, no real-life scene, no realistic skin or fur, no camera artifacts
no 3D, CGI, render, glossy product shot, text, logo, watermark, interface, or border

times.lighting: a pale sunrise glow, long soft shadows, and fresh warm highlights
diffused daylight, a quiet overhead glow, and balanced muted contrast
low vermilion and amber light, long graphic shadows, and a fading luminous horizon
deep indigo darkness, sparse moonlit highlights, and a restrained nocturnal glow

clear.weather: clear, calm weather represented with open air and spacious light

cloudy.weather: overcast or misty weather represented with layered veils and softened contrast

rain.weather: rain represented with rhythmic lines, reflective shapes, and saturated pools of color

snow.weather: snow represented with drifting marks, pale fields, and crystalline negative space

storm.weather: storm weather represented with directional brushwork, charged clouds, and symbolic flashes of light

jack-russell.subject: a small energetic Jack Russell Terrier, rendered as a loose white and warm-brown painted silhouette with simple expressive marks, never realistic fur
artDirections: nostalgic watercolor and gouache illustration, bleeding pigment, paper grain, softened ink contours, and painterly color washes
editorial storybook illustration, broad handmade brush shapes, imperfect linework, and a limited earthy palette
soft ink-and-watercolor cover art, translucent layered washes, decorative marks, and dreamlike atmospheric depth
abstract children's-book illustration, tactile paper texture, loose cut-paper-like forms, and gentle pigment blooms
compositions: vertical 9:16 composition with the small dog modestly placed in the lower third and a large abstract sky above
vertical 9:16 composition from a gentle top-down angle, with a winding symbolic path carrying the eye through the frame
vertical 9:16 composition with a centered dog and a broad landscape built from overlapping soft color fields
vertical 9:16 composition with the dog at an edge of the frame, generous negative space, and sweeping weather shapes

clear: a sunlit hill becomes ribbons of grass, wildflower dots, and luminous sky washes
an abstract garden path winds between warm terracotta shapes and floating botanical marks
a quiet courtyard dissolves into golden tiles, leaf shadows, and translucent light
cloudy: a misty woodland lane is reduced to pale trunks, mossy blocks, and silver-blue cloud curtains
a windswept stone terrace overlooks a horizon made from layered gray-green paper washes
a quiet park becomes soft paths, blurred foliage, and drifting cool veils
rain: a rain-glossed garden path holds luminous puddles and decorative ripple rings
a fern trail becomes oversized emerald smudges, tiny streams, and wet ink lines
a flower-market lane breaks into jewel-toned awnings, reflected color, and playful rain marks
snow: a winter lane is built from powdery blue-white blocks, spare pawprint marks, and dark hedge silhouettes
a pine clearing dissolves into frosted brush shapes, soft drifts, and floating crystal symbols
an open snowfield stretches as pale ribbons with a few wind-carved sculptural forms
storm: a grassy rise bends into dark waves beneath expressive cloud masses and a symbolic lightning mark
a rocky overlook becomes layered charcoal forms, rain strokes, and a charged violet-gray sky
a meadow path is surrounded by spiraling reeds, scattered leaves, and a distant electric glow

samurai-zen.subject: a solitary simplified samurai silhouette with a sheathed sword and flowing robe, rendered as an ink figure or cut-paper shape, never a realistic person
artDirections: abstract sumi-e and woodblock-inspired illustration, dry-brush ink, warm handmade paper, indigo wash, and a restrained vermilion accent
minimal Japanese-inspired ink illustration, asymmetrical empty space, torn-paper texture, charcoal marks, and a single red sun-like disc
quiet editorial ink-and-gouache artwork, mineral pigments, broad brush pressure, subtle grain, and balanced negative space
meditative abstract printmaking style, flat carved shapes, faded black ink, parchment tones, and sparse cinnabar details
compositions: vertical 9:16 composition with the small figure low in frame, an oversized empty sky, and one dominant circular accent
vertical 9:16 composition organized around a diagonal mountain or wave gesture, with the figure as a quiet counterweight
vertical 9:16 composition with a torii-like geometric silhouette near the lower third and broad breathing room above
vertical 9:16 composition with layered foreground ink shapes, a distant horizon, and intentional areas of untouched paper

clear: a calm ridge, a vermilion sun disc, and a few wind-swept grass strokes
a shallow reflective pond reduced to pale bands, stones, and one quiet red seal-like circle
a mountain pass suggested by dry brush arcs and a luminous open sky
cloudy: mist rolling between abstract mountains as soft gray ink blooms and erased paper space
a weathered terrace beneath stacked cloud bands and a barely visible far horizon
a bamboo grove implied by vertical brush marks, pale fog, and muted blue-gray washes
rain: rain falling as precise vertical ink strokes over rippling black water and vermilion reflections
a narrow bridge implied by one dark shape over layered rain pools and drifting mist
a sheltering roofline as a bold graphic wedge against rhythmic rain marks
snow: a quiet temple path made of pale paper fields, sparse dark branches, and drifting ink flecks
a frozen lake with a single reed cluster, powdery white space, and muted blue shadow bands
a mountain shrine suggested by black brush forms emerging from a nearly blank snow field
storm: dark indigo cloud masses cut by one vermilion flash and sweeping calligraphic wind strokes
a cliff edge composed of charcoal blocks, turbulent rain marks, and a charged empty horizon
a torii-like silhouette facing rolling ink waves and symbolic lightning in the far distance

nothing-os.subject: an abstract weather instrument made from monochrome discs, dot-matrix fields, thin signal lines, and one small red indicator, with no device, brand, text, or logo
artDirections: minimal monochrome graphic illustration, black field, precise white dot grid, thin technical lines, subtle grain, and one signal-red accent
high-contrast abstract editorial graphic, soft black gradients, tiny halftone dots, modular circles, and restrained red illumination
brutally simple weather diagram illustration, near-black paper texture, white micro-mark geometry, and a single red orbital form
minimalist kinetic-poster aesthetic, grayscale dot clusters, cropped circles, faint scanline texture, and one controlled red pulse
compositions: vertical 9:16 composition with a large cropped circular system in the upper half and a quiet data-like field below
vertical 9:16 composition with an off-center red signal point, expansive black negative space, and carefully spaced dot clusters
vertical 9:16 composition built from stacked geometric weather layers and a sparse horizon line
vertical 9:16 composition with a central circular weather core, thin radiating paths, and asymmetrical micro-dot texture

clear: an open field of sparse dots around a bright circular core and a clean, lifted horizon line
concentric sun-like rings drifting through a mostly empty black field with a small red signal
a soft grayscale halo expanding across a quiet modular grid
cloudy: layered translucent gray discs and compressed dot clouds moving across a dark field
a low band of dense halftone fog interrupted by a small red location-like pulse
overlapping soft-edged monochrome modules obscuring a thin horizon line
rain: repeating vertical dot trails and thin reflective arcs flowing into a dark circular basin
a dense field of downward signal lines broken by concentric ripple rings and one red point
modular rain bands passing over a grayscale grid with subtle reflected highlights
snow: scattered white micro-dots suspended in a near-black void around a cold pale ring
a wide field of crystalline pixel-like marks with sparse circular frost halos
slowly drifting clusters of white points crossing quiet black geometric planes
storm: jagged white signal paths crossing dense dark dot clouds with a pulsing red warning point
compressed circular pressure fields, sharp broken lines, and a single vivid red storm core
high-energy grayscale arcs colliding around a dark center with controlled red interference
